name: @convariance/core
description: The convariance engine core: the versioned wire protocol, the BridgeSession transcript/signal/delegation state machine, the pluggable Classifier seam, and the sub-speaker segmenter. Zero dependencies, isomorphic (Node, workerd, browsers).

scripts.prepack: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_config_user_agent || '')) throw new Error('publish with pnpm (pnpm publish:all) — npm publish does not apply publishConfig.exports or rewrite workspace:^ deps')"
